notes: FEAT execution context: outbound feature_depends_on_item at depth 2 surfaces the DECs realized + FB items addressed + MODE (since FEAT→MODE uses same relation_type); inbound task_depends_on_task at depth 1 surfaces the TASKs implementing this FEAT. Composes the bundle a planner needs: what does this FEAT cover, what FB friction does it close, what TASKs implement it, what decisions ground it.
